about: Sample seed document: current/recent government contracts supporting Camp Arifjan and Camp Buehring, Kuwait.
Contract numbers, primes, values, and dates come from public sources (USAspending.gov, defense.gov contract
announcements, SAM.gov solicitations, army.mil, and contractor press releases) as of July 2026. Dollar values
are obligated/announced amounts or ceilings as noted, and some dates are approximate -- verify against
USAspending.gov / SAM.gov before relying on them. All people, phone numbers, emails, ratings, and milestone
entries are FICTIONAL placeholders for demo purposes. CAGE/UEI fields are left blank; fill them from the
contractor's SAM.gov entity registration if needed.

contracts.title: LOGCAP V — Kuwait Task Order (Base Life Support & Security)
contracts.milestone30: Monthly award-fee board inputs due; validate service order backlog at Arifjan and Buehring.
contracts.milestone60: QASP surveillance summary due to KO; review staffing levels against PWS matrix.
contracts.milestone90: Quarterly performance evaluation board (PEB) with V2X program management.
contracts.milestone120: Option/extension planning review with ACC-RI LOGCAP contracting office.
contracts.notes: Task order under LOGCAP V IDIQ W52P1J-19-D-0045. Successor to K-BOSSS. Covers base operations, security, and logistics at Camp Arifjan, Camp Buehring, Udairi Range Complex, Camp Patriot (KNB), Kuwait City International Airport, and Port of Shuaiba. ~$2.2B obligated to date; task orders extended through June 2030.
contracts.description: Logistics Civil Augmentation Program V support services in Kuwait: base life support, facilities O&M, security support, transportation, and theater logistics for U.S. Army installations in Kuwait.

contractors.notes: Prime. Incumbent from K-BOSSS; merged into V2X in 2022. Sample rating data.

contracts.title: Army Prepositioned Stocks-5 (APS-5) Kuwait Logistics Support — Camp Arifjan
contracts.milestone30: Validate equipment readiness / inventory accuracy reports for APS-5 warehouses.
contracts.milestone90: Transition planning sync for APS-5 recompete task order.
contracts.milestone120: Closeout prep: GFP inventory reconciliation and past-performance (CPARS) drafting.
contracts.notes: EAGLE BOA order; ceiling up to ~$1.5B with multiple mods (e.g., $142.0M mod through Nov 2025). Recompete APS-5 Kuwait task order awarded to Amentum-Parsons JV (~$128.2M) in 2024 and protested by V2X — confirm current performer before use.
contracts.description: Program management, warehousing, inventory control, field-level maintenance, and issue/receipt of Army Prepositioned Stock equipment sets at Camp Arifjan and associated sites in Kuwait.

contractors.notes: Prime (formerly AECOM Management Services). Sample rating data.

contracts.title: Kuwait Dining Facilities (DFAC 3.0) — Camp Arifjan & Camp Buehring
contracts.milestone30: Monthly sanitation/food-safety surveillance checklists for all nine DFACs.
contracts.milestone60: Headcount and meal-rate reconciliation with contracting office.
contracts.milestone90: Quarterly performance review; validate incentive-fee metrics.
contracts.milestone120: Follow-on requirement planning (see 408th CSB RFQ W912D1-23-Q-0003 for Arifjan/Buehring DFAC).
contracts.notes: Number shown is the solicitation; award announced Feb 2018 to Vectrus (~$108M, hybrid CPFF/performance-incentive, 5-year potential PoP). Continuous operation of nine DFACs at Camp Arifjan, Camp Buehring, Kuwait Naval Base, Ali Al Salem AB, and Mubarak AB. Dates approximate; DFAC operations have since folded into follow-on vehicles.
contracts.description: Full food service operations — personnel, equipment, supplies, transportation, and supervision — for Army dining facilities in Kuwait.

contractors.notes: Prime for DFAC 3.0. Sample rating data.

contracts.title: Subsistence Prime Vendor — Kuwait (Food Supply & Distribution)
contracts.milestone30: Fill-rate and order-ship-time metrics review with DLA account manager.
contracts.milestone120: Recompete tracking: SPE300-23-R-0007 (Subsistence Prime Vendor Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Syria).
contracts.notes: DLA Troop Support prime vendor supplying DFACs at Camp Arifjan, Camp Buehring, and other Kuwait sites. ~$2.16B value if all options exercised (18-month base + options). Start/end dates approximate — verify current ordering period on USAspending.gov.
contracts.description: Full-line food distribution: purchasing, storage, stock rotation, and delivery of subsistence (including UGRs, MREs, kosher/halal meals) to military customers in Kuwait.

contractors.notes: Prime vendor since 2008 era of the SPV program in Kuwait/Iraq/Jordan. Sample rating data.

contracts.title: Camp Arifjan Construction — USACE (AICI-Archirodon JV)
contracts.milestone30: Submittal register and construction schedule (NAS) review.
contracts.milestone60: QA/QC site surveillance; safety (EM 385-1-1) compliance check.
contracts.milestone90: Progress payment / earned-value review with USACE resident office.
contracts.milestone120: Pre-final inspection planning and punch-list development.
contracts.notes: Firm-fixed-price construction award of $9,688,000 announced Sept 18, 2024 (10 bids received), administered by USACE Louisville District; completion due March 21, 2027. Award number not published in the public announcement — replace 'XXXX' after verifying on USAspending.gov.
contracts.agency: USACE (Louisville District / Transatlantic Middle East District)
contracts.description: Military construction services at Camp Arifjan, Kuwait.

contractors.notes: Prime (McLean, VA JV). Also holds other USACE Middle East District work. Sample rating data.

contracts.title: K-BOSSS — Kuwait Base Operations & Security Support Services (legacy)
contracts.notes: CLOSED / historical reference. Cost-plus award-fee base operations and security contract for Camp Arifjan, Camp Buehring, Udairi Range, and Camp Patriot. Initial value ~$1.3B, grew substantially over extensions. Work transitioned into LOGCAP V Kuwait Task Order W52P1J-19-F-0400. End date approximate.
contracts.description: Legacy base operations and security support services contract for U.S. Army installations in Kuwait; predecessor to the LOGCAP V Kuwait task order.

contractors.notes: Prime for full period of performance. Sample rating data.
